evidence.locator: results: eight named failed cells across agreement-overclaim, provenance-missing-link, and tiny-ablation-overclaim
evidence.description: A fresh deterministic replay recorded the exact outcomes for four builder-authored calibration cases; eight cells were authored as planted failure signatures and emitted failed.
limitations: The fixtures, expected failure signatures, graders, and metric were authored within the same project.
The exact eight cells are a finite calibration set, not a probability sample.
This is not evidence of semantic accuracy, professional capability, treatment efficacy, production representativeness, or readiness.

metrics.construct: Exact deterministic emission of the eight internally planted failed check outcomes
metrics.intended_decision: Raise an internal regression alert if a pinned implementation no longer emits all eight exact planted failures.
prohibited_interpretations: Grader accuracy, precision, recall, reliability, or calibration on any target population
Agent capability, professional artifact quality, procedural-skill efficacy, production fitness, or deployment readiness
Representativeness of the synthetic fixture population

observable.predicate: For each of the eight explicitly enumerated planted-negative case-by-check cells, the deterministic grader output equals failed.
observable.outcome_mapping: Numerator increments exactly when an enumerated cell equals the literal string failed; passed is a miss; absent or other values follow invalid/missing rules rather than becoming failures.
observable.insufficient_evidence_state: A missing case, check, artifact, or executable replay makes the metric invalid and blocks the regression claim.

candidate_policy.availability_rule: No tool or action candidate universe is part of this exact fixture predicate.
candidate_policy.equivalence_rule: Only literal equality to the pinned failed outcome counts; semantic alternatives are outside this regression metric.

population.eligible_event: Exactly the eight named planted-negative case-by-check cells in the immutable measurement; no other outcomes are eligible.
inclusion: Cell locator is one of the eight predeclared locators
Referenced grader and measurement hashes match
exclusion: The one intentionally passing causal-claim-strength cell in agreement-overclaim
Any unlisted case or later fixture version
population.sampling: Complete enumeration of this fixed internal calibration population; no population sampling or extrapolation.
population.target_population: Only the eight enumerated internal fixture cells.

computation.numerator: Count of the eight eligible cells whose recorded outcome is failed.
computation.denominator_or_scale: All eight predeclared eligible cells; denominator is fixed at eight and cannot silently shrink.
computation.aggregation: One unweighted binary match per eligible case-by-check cell; sum matches and divide by eight.
computation.weighting: Equal weight per predeclared cell; no task, criterion, or severity weights.
computation.dependence_policy: Report this exact finite set only; do not use eight correlated co-authored cells as independent inferential samples.

uncertainty.resampling_unit: Not applicable to exact enumeration of the eight-cell fixture population.
uncertainty.justification: The estimate exactly enumerates the declared finite calibration population; it carries no sampling interval or external generalization.

fidelity.target_population: No external target population is claimed; the scope is the exact internal fixture cells.

observed_estimates.interpretation: All eight predeclared internal failure cells emitted failed for the pinned local implementations; nothing broader is licensed.

expiry_triggers: Any eligible locator or expected outcome changes
The deterministic replay cannot be reproduced

baseline.comparability_rule: Compare only exact component hashes and the exact eight-cell fixture population; otherwise expire this policy and author a new version.

threshold.detection_target: Any changed or missing expected failure outcome among the eight internal calibration cells.

monitoring_policies.loss_basis: A false negative could hide a deterministic contract regression; a false alert costs only internal contributor investigation and cannot block a production or capability decision.

alert.route: Fail the local/CI validation command and retain the differing cell locators.
alert.deduplication: One alert per metric version and changed artifact-hash tuple.

audit.selection: Inspect all eight cells and rerun both deterministic graders; no sampling.
audit.reviewer: A contributor who did not make the triggering code change when available; this is code review, not expert validation.
audit.burden_measure: Record reviewer minutes and number of reruns in the change record.

actions: Identify whether grader, fixture, or execution changed
Create new immutable versions for intentional changes
remediation.deadline: Before merging the change that triggered the regression alert.
remediation.success_evidence: Fresh replay equals the intended versioned outcome table and all path/hash checks pass.

rollback.trigger: An unintended grader or fixture change is confirmed and cannot be corrected safely before merge.
rollback.target: Restore the last pinned implementation or fixture bytes without rewriting historical measurements.
rollback.verification: Rerun the exact metric, validator, repository tests, and artifact hash checks.
